> **KNOWN ISSUE**: this report's data is biased by a coordinator
> bug (single-quoted heredoc preserved `MODE='$MODE'` literally in
> the per-host `start-args` file).  Floki's chaos bounces
> alternated the backend between redis and memcached every cycle,
> so floki produced 0 successful memcache ops while the other
> hosts ran cleanly.  Fixed in commit landed alongside this
> report.  See `docs/journal/2026-05-26-mode-leak-bug.md`.
> Pass-6 will re-run with the fix.
